summary: Add a curated cart preview command for checkout and optional fee-tally review without order placement.
reason: bricenice17 needs a safe pre-order view of restaurant, items, delivery address, payment method, tip, fees, and total; the command must never call createOrderFromCart.
validated_outcome: go test ./... passed; go build ./cmd/doordash-pp-cli passed; cart preview --dry-run --agent with checkout and fee variables printed POST previews for /graphql/checkout and /graphql/totalFeeTally, returned order_placement=not_called, and did not call createOrderFromCart.
